name: Studio footprint optimization and regional collaboration
consequences: Immediate: Expand in-house studio footprint by adding two regional hubs. → Systemic: Development capacity rises by 16% while annual operating costs increase by 7%, creating a trade-off between speed and cohesion. → Strategic: Tighter alignment with creative direction enables faster iteration but increases management overhead and integration risk.
options: Consolidate development into a flagship studio and enforce rigid on-site sprints with periodic offsite reviews.
Establish regional hubs with hybrid onsite-offsite collaboration and a unified toolchain across sites.
Deploy a hardware-as-a-service edge-lab network with co-investment from hardware partners and real-time collaboration platforms.
review: Controls speed-to-market vs long-term quality. Weakness: The options fail to consider production ramp-up timelines and hardware supply constraints.

name: Narrative integrity and dynamic morality
consequences: Immediate: Deploy modular narrative blocks and a branching morality framework. → Systemic: Branching paths increase player agency by 25% but QA/testing resources grow by 12%, trading depth for cadence. → Strategic: Increases immersion and replayability but extends development cycles and complicates localization.
options: Craft a fixed, tightly authored main narrative with clear moral trajectories and heavy QA gates.
Adopt modular, branching narratives triggered by player choices with a dynamic morality engine.
Implement AI-assisted dialogue generation and procedural story arcs to adapt the narrative in real-time.
review: Controls speed-to-market vs long-term quality. Weakness: The options fail to consider production ramp-up timelines and hardware supply constraints.

options: Implement a player-driven, dynamic black-market economy with variable pricing and supply chains.
